name: A Christmas Potpourri- Victoria Magazine
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the juniper, rosebuds, bay leaves, cinnamon chips, cloves, and cones in a large ceramic bowl.
2. In a separate dish, mix the oils (rose, pine, and cinnamon) with the orrisroot.
3. Stir this mixture into the herb and spice combination.
4. Place the potpourri in an open container to mellow for several weeks, stirring occasionally.
5. Scatter rose blossoms and cinnamon sticks on top of the potpourri before use.
